title: One Sleepy Owl
cover_prompt: four tiny dots in a diagonal line, each dimmer than the last, on deep muted blue
lyrics:
[verse]
One sleepy owl blinks slow
In the pine where breezes blow

[verse]
One sleepy owl blinks slow
Two soft foxes curl below

[verse]
One sleepy owl blinks slow
Two soft foxes curl below
Three little deer lie low

[verse]
One sleepy owl blinks slow
Two soft foxes curl below
Three little deer lie low
Four baby rabbits row by row
And that was all
style_prompt: Children's counting lullaby, clear sweet female vocal, xylophone and music box, 66 BPM, simple repetitive melody, same tune every line, cumulative nursery rhyme structure, bright but soft, childlike, extremely predictable rhythm, music box accompaniment
